properties.description: SMAT PO EXTRACT - ADLS Raw to Synapse Stage table

activities.name: Check Combined File non zero Bytes
activities.description: Check if the combined file has any data to be loaded.

activities.name: Set start date
activities.description: Set the last stage run date to the variable as start date.

activities.name: cp_Get_Latest_File
activities.description: Copy all the files created since the last start date and combine them into one file to be processed into Synapse.

dependsOn.activity: Check Combined File non zero Bytes

ifTrueActivities.name: Copy Latest Data To Synapse Stage Table

activities.name: Delete Temp combined File
activities.description: After the data has been loaded, clear the combined file from the ADLSV2

activities.name: lkup_Get_Pipeline_parameters_getlrd
activities.description: Use the lookup procedure to get the last run details to be used in the next steps.

activities.name: sp_Update_Parameter
activities.description: Update the appropriate parameter in the parameter table

activities.name: sp_Update_project_number
activities.description:
This SPU updates:
Stage Project_number with '99' as required
Restructures 'Account_number' in format the correct format
Reprocess date columns are converted to date to allow the generic procedure to process them.
